disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe throbbing pain at the lateral edge of the right great-toe nail, worsening over three weeks and sharply worse in the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and how long has it been there?
What does the pain feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep throbbing pain right at the outer corner of my big-toe nail. It's been building for about three weeks and got much worse in the last day or two.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellow purulent discharge expressible from the lateral nail fold
trigger_question_examples: Is there any discharge or pus?
Is anything weeping from the toe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, there's yellow pus coming out of the side of the nail when I press near it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A small raised area of friable red tissue at the nail edge that bleeds easily on contact
trigger_question_examples: Is there any lump or overgrown skin at the nail edge?
Does anything bleed when it is touched?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a little lump of raw red flesh right where the nail digs in, and it bleeds if it gets knocked.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The corner of the nail feels as though it is penetrating into the adjacent skin; the patient's own recurring nail problem on the same toe
trigger_question_examples: Does the nail feel like it is growing into the skin?
Has this toe done this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, the edge of the nail feels like it's cutting into the skin. It's caught and been sore before but never anywhere near this bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to tolerate closed footwear; antalgic gait; unable to attend work
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your walking and daily activities?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't get a closed shoe or work boot on at all, I'm limping, and I've had to stay off work.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, rigors, or spreading redness up the foot reported; systemically well
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or sweats?
Is the redness spreading up your foot or ankle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shivering, and the redness is just around the nail — it's not spreading up my foot.
